en: Hang from bar, hands shoulder-width, overhand grip.
Pull chest to bar, elbows drive down.
Lower under control to full hang.
zh-Hans: 悬挂在杠上, 双手与肩同宽, 正握.
拉胸口靠近杠, 肘部下压.
控制下放至完全悬垂.

en: Don't swing or kip — leads to shoulder strain.
Avoid partial reps — train full range of motion.
zh-Hans: 不要摆动或借力 — 容易拉伤肩膀.
避免半程动作 — 全程发力.

en: Grip bar wider than shoulders, overhand.
Pull up by squeezing lats — chest to bar.
Lower slowly, full extension at bottom.
zh-Hans: 宽于肩膀握杠, 正握.
收紧背阔肌上拉 — 胸口靠杠.
缓慢下放, 底部完全伸展.

en: Don't go too wide — strains shoulder joint.
zh-Hans: 握距不要过宽 — 拉伤肩关节.

en: Grip bar narrower than shoulders, overhand.
Pull up, focus on lats and biceps.
Lower fully under control.
zh-Hans: 窄于肩膀握杠, 正握.
上拉, 重点感受背阔肌和二头.
完全控制下放.

en: Grip parallel handles, palms facing each other.
Pull up — elbows tuck into sides.
Lower under control to full hang.
zh-Hans: 握平行手柄, 掌心相对.
上拉 — 肘部贴紧体侧.
控制下放至完全悬垂.

en: Hang from bar, underhand grip, shoulder-width.
Pull chin over bar, biceps engaged.
Lower slowly to full hang.
zh-Hans: 悬挂杠上, 反握, 与肩同宽.
下巴超过杠, 二头发力.
缓慢下放至完全悬垂.

en: Don't kip — keep core tight, no leg swing.
zh-Hans: 不要借力 — 核心收紧, 腿不晃.

en: Attach weight via belt or dumbbell between feet.
Pull up explosively, chest to bar.
Lower under control to full hang.
zh-Hans: 用腰带挂重物或双脚夹哑铃.
爆发上拉, 胸口靠杠.
控制下放至完全悬垂.

en: Master bodyweight pull-ups before adding load.
Don't add weight if form breaks down.
zh-Hans: 先掌握徒手引体再加负重.
动作变形就不要加重量.

en: Loop band over bar, place one foot or knee in band.
Pull up, band assists at bottom.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 弹力带挂杠, 一脚或膝盖踩入带.
上拉, 底部弹力带辅助.
控制下放.

en: Kneel on platform, grip handles overhand.
Pull body up, chest toward handles.
Lower slowly to full hang.
zh-Hans: 跪在平台上, 正握手柄.
上拉身体, 胸口靠近手柄.
缓慢下放至完全伸展.

en: Swing body in arch-hollow position.
Use kip momentum to pull explosively.
Chest to bar, return to swing.
zh-Hans: 身体在凹凸位之间摆动.
利用摆浪惯性爆发上拉.
胸口靠杠, 回到摆动.

en: Master strict pull-ups first — kipping stresses shoulders.
Not for hypertrophy — this is for CrossFit/conditioning.
zh-Hans: 先掌握严格引体 — 摆浪给肩膀压力大.
不适合增肌 — 是CrossFit/体能训练.

en: Wide grip, pull to one side, other arm extends.
Working arm bends, other stays straight.
Lower, then repeat on other side.
zh-Hans: 宽握, 偏向一侧上拉, 另一臂伸展.
工作臂弯, 另一臂保持伸直.
下放, 换侧重复.

en: Requires significant pull-up strength — progress gradually.
zh-Hans: 需要较强引体基础 — 循序渐进.

en: Drape towel over bar, grip each end.
Pull up, crush grip on towel.
Lower slowly, maintain grip.
zh-Hans: 毛巾搭在杠上, 双手抓两端.
上拉, 紧握毛巾.
缓慢下放, 握力不松.

en: Grip bar end with both hands, one in front of other.
Pull head to one side, alternate per rep.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 手前后分握杠端.
头偏向一侧上拉, 每次交替.
控制下放.

en: Hang from bar, raise legs to 90° (L-shape).
Hold L-position, perform pull-up.
Lower under control, keep legs up.
zh-Hans: 悬挂杠上, 双腿抬至90度 (L形).
保持L形, 做引体向上.
控制下放, 双腿保持抬起.

en: Build core strength + pull-up endurance separately first.
zh-Hans: 先单独练核心和引体耐力.

en: One hand overhand, one hand underhand.
Pull up, alternate grip each set.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 一手正握, 一手反握.
上拉, 每组交换握法.
控制下放.

en: Jump or step up to top position, chin over bar.
Lower slowly — 3-5 seconds to full hang.
Reset, repeat.
zh-Hans: 跳起或踩到顶部, 下巴过杠.
缓慢下放 — 3-5秒到完全伸展.
重置, 重复.

en: Hands touching or near-touching, overhand.
Pull up, full elbow flex at top.
Lower slowly to full hang.
zh-Hans: 双手相触或贴近, 正握.
上拉, 顶部肘部完全屈.
缓慢下放至完全伸展.

en: Attach weight via belt or dumbbell between feet.
Underhand grip, pull chin over bar.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 用腰带挂重物或双脚夹哑铃.
反握, 下巴拉过杠.
控制下放.

en: Master strict bodyweight chin-ups before adding load.
zh-Hans: 先掌握徒手反握引体再加负重.

en: Explosive pull-up, transition to dip at bar.
Lock out arms above the bar.
Lower under control to hang.
zh-Hans: 爆发引体, 过渡到杠上臂屈伸.
杠上锁定双臂.
控制下放至悬垂.

en: Requires solid pull-up + dip strength first.
False grip prevents wrist strain at transition.
zh-Hans: 需要扎实的引体+臂屈伸基础.
假握避免过渡时拉伤手腕.

en: Pull up to top, shift body side to side along bar.
Working arm bent, other extended.
Travel back across, then lower.
zh-Hans: 上拉到顶, 身体沿杠左右移动.
工作臂弯曲, 另一臂伸展.
横移回来再下放.

en: Advanced — requires mastered pull-up + archer pull-up.
zh-Hans: 高级 — 需要掌握引体和弓箭引体.

en: Hang from one arm, other arm free or holding wrist.
Pull up using single arm.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 单臂悬挂, 另一手放开或抓手腕.
单臂上拉.
控制下放.

en: Extremely advanced — years of pull-up training prerequisite.
Train one-arm negatives extensively first.
zh-Hans: 极高级 — 需要多年引体训练基础.
先大量练单臂离心.

en: Hinge at hips, torso 45° to floor, grip bar.
Pull bar to lower chest, elbows back.
Lower under control to full extension.
zh-Hans: 髋部前屈, 躯干与地面成45度, 握杠.
拉杠至下胸, 肘部后拉.
控制下放至完全伸展.

en: Don't round lower back — keep neutral spine.
Avoid using momentum — strict form.
zh-Hans: 不要圆背 — 脊柱保持中立.
不要借力 — 严格动作.

en: Hinge at hips, grip bar underhand shoulder-width.
Pull to lower abs, elbows tight to body.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 髋部前屈, 反握杠与肩同宽.
拉至下腹, 肘部贴身.
控制下放.

en: Keep wrists neutral — don't let bar pull them back.
zh-Hans: 手腕中立 — 不要被杠拉后.

en: Torso parallel to floor, bar starts on ground.
Explosive pull to lower chest each rep.
Reset bar on floor between reps.
zh-Hans: 躯干平行地面, 杠从地面起始.
每次爆发拉至下胸.
每次组间杠重新放地面.

en: Keep torso parallel — don't stand up to lift bar.
zh-Hans: 躯干保持平行 — 不要起身用力.

en: Torso 70° upright, underhand grip.
Pull bar to lower abdomen.
Lower under control, slight stretch.
zh-Hans: 躯干70度直立, 反握.
拉杠至下腹.
控制下放, 轻微拉伸.

en: Straddle T-bar, hinge at hips, grip V-handle.
Pull handle to chest, squeeze back.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 跨T杠, 髋部前屈, 握V把.
拉把至胸部, 收紧背部.
控制下放.

en: Keep back flat — don't round when going heavy.
zh-Hans: 背部保持平直 — 大重量不圆背.

en: Lie chest-down on angled pad, grip handles.
Pull to chest, retract shoulder blades.
Lower with control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 俯卧斜垫上, 握手柄.
拉至胸部, 后缩肩胛.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Hinge forward, dumbbell in each hand.
Pull both dumbbells to hips.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 前屈, 双手各持哑铃.
双哑铃拉至髋部.
控制下放.

en: Keep back flat — hinge from hips, not waist.
zh-Hans: 背部平直 — 髋部铰链, 不弯腰.

en: One knee + hand on bench, other hand holds dumbbell.
Pull dumbbell to hip, elbow up and back.
Lower with control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 单膝单手撑凳, 另一手持哑铃.
拉哑铃至髋部, 肘部上后.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Don't twist torso to lift — keep spine neutral.
zh-Hans: 不要扭躯干借力 — 脊柱中立.

en: Lie chest-down on incline bench, dumbbells hang.
Row both dumbbells to ribcage.
Lower under control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 俯卧上斜凳, 哑铃自然下垂.
双哑铃拉至肋骨.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Lie face-down on 30-45° incline bench.
Row dumbbells to lower ribs.
Lower slowly, full stretch at bottom.
zh-Hans: 俯卧于30-45度上斜凳.
哑铃拉至下肋.
缓慢下放, 底部充分拉伸.

en: Stand perpendicular to landmine bar end.
Grip end with single hand, hinge forward.
Row bar to hip, full stretch at bottom.
zh-Hans: 垂直站于地雷杆端旁.
单手握杠端, 前屈.
拉杠至髋部, 底部充分拉伸.

en: Chest on steep incline bench (60°), underhand grip.
Row dumbbells to belly with elbows wide.
Pause and lower under control.
zh-Hans: 胸贴陡上斜凳 (60度), 反握.
肘部外展, 哑铃拉至腹部.
顶部停, 控制下放.

en: Lie face-down on raised bench, barbell below.
Row bar straight up to bench.
Lower under control, strict form.
zh-Hans: 俯卧高凳上, 杠铃在下.
直拉杠至凳底.
控制下放, 严格动作.

en: Sit on cable row station, grip V-handle.
Pull handle to lower abs, chest up.
Extend arms, slight forward lean to stretch.
zh-Hans: 坐于划船器, 握V把.
拉至下腹, 挺胸.
伸臂前倾, 拉伸背阔肌.

en: Don't use back to swing — keep torso stable.
zh-Hans: 不要用躯干摆动借力 — 保持稳定.

en: Use wide bar attachment, overhand grip.
Pull bar to upper abdomen, elbows wide.
Squeeze upper back, lower with control.
zh-Hans: 用宽杆, 正握.
拉至上腹, 肘部外展.
收紧上背, 控制下放.

en: Low pulley, sit close, grip V-handle.
Pull to belly button, elbows tight.
Extend slowly, feel lats stretch.
zh-Hans: 低位定滑轮, 坐近, 握V把.
拉至肚脐, 肘部贴身.
缓慢伸展, 感受背阔肌拉伸.

en: Mid pulley height, V-handle, seated or standing.
Pull to chest, squeeze mid-back.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 中位滑轮, V把, 坐姿或站姿.
拉至胸部, 收紧中背.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Pulley above head, rope or straight bar.
Pull bar to upper chest/face, elbows high.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 滑轮在头上, 绳索或直杆.
拉至上胸/面部, 肘部高.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Single handle, kneel or stand sideways.
Pull handle to hip with rotation.
Extend slowly, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 单手把, 跪姿或侧站.
拉手把至髋, 略带旋转.
缓慢伸展, 充分拉伸.

en: Kneel facing cable, grip V-handle or straight bar.
Pull to lower chest, sit back slightly.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 跪对绳索机, 握V把或直杆.
拉至下胸, 略向后坐.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Attach rope, neutral grip, seated or standing.
Pull rope ends to ribs, separate at end.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 用绳索把手, 中立握, 坐或站.
拉绳两端至肋, 末端外分.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Sit at machine, chest against pad, grip handles.
Pull handles back, retract scapula.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 胸贴垫, 握手柄.
拉手柄后, 后缩肩胛.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Sit at row machine, grip one handle.
Pull handle back with strong squeeze.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于划船机, 握单手柄.
向后拉手柄, 强收紧.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Stand under Smith bar, hinge forward.
Pull bar to lower chest.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站于史密斯杠下, 前屈.
拉杠至下胸.
控制下放.

en: Bar at hip height, lie under it, grip bar.
Pull chest to bar, body straight.
Lower under control, arms straight.
zh-Hans: 杠在髋高, 仰卧握杠.
拉胸口至杠, 身体保持直线.
控制下放, 手臂伸直.

en: Bar at hip height, feet on bench/box.
Pull chest to bar, body straight.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠在髋高, 脚踩凳或箱上.
拉胸口至杠, 身体保持直线.
控制下放.

en: Hang from rings, body angled to floor.
Pull chest to rings, body straight.
Lower under control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 悬挂吊环, 身体倾斜.
拉胸口至环, 身体保持直线.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Grip TRX handles, lean back, body angled.
Pull chest to handles, elbows back.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 握TRX把, 后倾, 身体倾斜.
拉胸至把, 肘部后拉.
控制下放.

en: Heavy dumbbell, brace one arm on bench.
Pull explosively, allow body english.
High reps with heavy weight.
zh-Hans: 大重量哑铃, 单手撑凳.
爆发拉, 允许身体借力.
高次数加大重量.

en: Form intentionally loose — needs back conditioning.
zh-Hans: 动作刻意宽松 — 需背部基础.

en: Plank position, gripping dumbbells.
Row one dumbbell up, keep hips still.
Alternate sides, brace core throughout.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 手握哑铃.
单手拉哑铃, 髋部不动.
左右交替, 核心全程收紧.

en: Don't twist hips — keep them square to floor.
zh-Hans: 髋部不要扭转 — 与地面平行.

en: Straddle bar in landmine, V-handle on bar.
Hinge forward, row bar to chest.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 跨地雷杠, V把套杠.
前屈, 拉杠至胸.
控制下放.

en: Stand beside landmine, hinge forward.
Grip bar end one hand, row to hip.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站于地雷旁, 前屈.
单手握杠端, 拉至髋.
控制下放.

en: Smith bar at low position, hinge forward.
Row bar straight up to torso.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杠置低位, 前屈.
直拉杠至躯干.
控制下放.

en: One hand on bench, feet on floor, dumbbell other hand.
Row dumbbell to hip, no rotation.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 单手撑凳, 双脚着地, 单手哑铃.
拉哑铃至髋, 不旋转.
控制下放.

en: High pulley, rope, pull to face level.
Elbows high, rope ends to ears.
Squeeze rear delts, extend slowly.
zh-Hans: 高位滑轮, 绳索, 拉至脸位.
肘部高, 绳两端至耳侧.
收紧后束, 缓慢伸展.

en: Sit on bench, hinge forward, dumbbells hang.
Row dumbbells to ribs, squeeze back.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 前屈, 哑铃下垂.
拉哑铃至肋, 收紧背部.
控制下放.

en: Stand beside barbell, hinge forward.
Grip center of bar one hand, row to hip.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站于杠铃旁, 前屈.
单手握杠中部, 拉至髋.
控制下放.

en: Kettlebells on floor, hinge forward over them.
Row one KB up while other rests on floor.
Alternate sides, explosive pull.
zh-Hans: 壶铃放地, 前屈于上方.
单手拉壶铃, 另一边停地面.
左右交替, 爆发拉.

en: Bar on floor, hinge over, full grip.
Pull explosively to chest.
Lower fully to floor, pause, reset.
zh-Hans: 杠在地面, 前屈, 满握.
爆发拉至胸.
完全下放至地面, 暂停, 重置.

en: Reset between reps — no bounce off floor.
zh-Hans: 每次重置 — 不要利用反弹.

en: Sit at pulldown station, grip bar overhand.
Pull bar to upper chest, elbows drive down.
Extend slowly to full stretch.
zh-Hans: 坐于下拉机, 正握杠.
拉杠至上胸, 肘部下压.
缓慢伸展, 充分拉伸.

en: Don't lean back excessively — keep torso mostly upright.
zh-Hans: 不要过度后仰 — 躯干基本直立.

en: Grip wider than shoulders, overhand.
Pull bar to upper chest, lats engaged.
Extend slowly to full stretch.
zh-Hans: 宽于肩握杠, 正握.
拉至上胸, 背阔肌发力.
缓慢伸展, 充分拉伸.

en: Use V-handle or close-grip bar, neutral grip.
Pull handle to lower chest, elbows tight.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 用V把或近握杠, 中立握.
拉至下胸, 肘部贴身.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Parallel handles, palms facing each other.
Pull handles to chest, elbows down and back.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 平行手柄, 掌心相对.
拉至胸前, 肘部下后.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Underhand grip on bar, shoulder-width.
Pull bar to upper chest, elbows tight.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 反握杠, 与肩同宽.
拉至上胸, 肘部贴身.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Attach V-bar, neutral grip.
Pull handle to upper chest.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 用V把, 中立握.
拉至上胸.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Wide overhand grip, lean slightly forward.
Pull bar behind neck to base of skull.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 宽正握, 略前倾.
拉杠至颈后到后脑.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Requires good shoulder mobility — risky if tight.
Use lighter weight — focus on form.
zh-Hans: 需要良好肩部灵活性 — 紧的话风险大.
用轻重量 — 注重动作.

en: Single handle, sit at pulldown station.
Pull handle to shoulder, focus on lat.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 单手把, 坐于下拉机.
拉至肩, 重点感受背阔肌.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: High pulley, straight bar, arms extended.
Pull bar down to thighs, arms straight.
Return slowly to overhead position.
zh-Hans: 高位滑轮, 直杠, 手臂伸直.
拉杠至大腿, 手臂保持直.
缓慢返回头顶位置.

en: Attach rope to high pulley, neutral grip.
Arms straight, pull rope down past hips.
Squeeze lats, return slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索接高位滑轮, 中立握.
手臂伸直, 拉绳过髋.
收紧背阔肌, 缓慢回.

en: Kneel below cable, grip wide bar.
Pull bar to chest, lats engaged.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 跪于绳索下, 握宽杠.
拉至胸, 背阔肌发力.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Sit at machine, grip handles.
Pull handles down to shoulders.
Extend with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 握手柄.
拉手柄至肩.
控制伸展.

en: Underhand grip, narrow on bar.
Pull bar to upper chest, focus on lats.
Extend slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 反握, 握距窄.
拉至上胸, 重点感受背阔肌.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Loop band overhead, kneel or sit.
Pull ends down to shoulders.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 弹力带挂顶, 跪或坐.
拉两端至肩.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: High pulley, single handle, arm straight.
Pull arm down to hip, lat squeeze.
Return slowly to overhead.
zh-Hans: 高位滑轮, 单手把, 手臂伸直.
拉至髋, 收紧背阔肌.
缓慢回到头顶.

en: Bar over mid-foot, shins close.
Brace core, hinge hips back, grip bar.
Drive heels into floor — keep back flat.
Lock out at top, hips and shoulders together.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在脚中, 小腿贴近.
核心收紧, 髋部后推抓杠.
脚跟发力 — 背部保持挺直.
顶部锁定, 髋和肩同时到位.

en: Don't round lower back — straight spine, hinge from hips.
Hands at shoulder width, not too narrow.
Reset between reps if form breaks.
zh-Hans: 不要圆背 — 脊柱保持中立, 髋部铰链.
握距与肩同宽, 不要太窄.
如果动作变形, 在每次重复之间重置.

en: Wide stance, toes turned out 30-45°.
Grip inside knees, chest up, back flat.
Drive through heels, knees track over toes.
Lock out at top, squeeze glutes.
zh-Hans: 宽距站, 脚尖外展30-45度.
膝盖内握杠, 挺胸平背.
脚跟发力, 膝盖随脚尖方向.
顶部锁定, 收紧臀部.

en: Don't round back at any point.
Wide stance requires hip mobility — warm up first.
zh-Hans: 全程不要圆背.
宽距需髋部灵活性 — 先热身.

en: Start standing with bar at hip, knees slightly bent.
Hinge hips back, lower bar along legs.
Stop when hamstrings stretch, return up.
zh-Hans: 站立, 杠在髋部, 膝盖微屈.
髋后推, 杠沿腿下放.
腘绳肌拉伸到位停, 起身.

en: Keep bar close to legs — don't let it drift forward.
Stop at hamstring stretch — no need to touch floor.
zh-Hans: 杠贴腿 — 不要前飘.
腘绳肌拉伸即可 — 不必触地.

en: Stand with bar, legs nearly straight (slight bend).
Hinge hips back, lower bar to mid-shin.
Drive hips forward to stand back up.
zh-Hans: 站持杠, 腿近乎伸直 (微屈).
髋后推, 杠下放至小腿中部.
髋前送, 起身回到顶.

en: Maintain neutral spine — common form failure.
Use less weight than conventional deadlift.
zh-Hans: 脊柱中立 — 常见错误.
重量小于常规硬拉.

en: Stand inside trap bar, neutral grip on handles.
Hinge down, brace core, chest up.
Drive through heels, stand up tall.
zh-Hans: 站于六角杠内, 中立握手柄.
下蹲, 核心收紧, 挺胸.
脚跟发力, 站直.

en: Easier on lower back than conventional — good for beginners.
Still respect form — back flat throughout.
zh-Hans: 对下背压力小于常规 — 适合新手.
仍需注意动作 — 全程平背.

en: Stand on plate or platform (2-4 inch deficit).
Hinge down to bar, brace, pull.
Lock out at top, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站于杠片或平台上 (5-10cm赤字).
下蹲握杠, 核心收紧, 拉.
顶部锁定, 控制下放.

en: Increased ROM stresses lower back — start light.
Requires hip mobility and trained form.
zh-Hans: 增加幅度给下背更大压力 — 从轻开始.
需要髋部灵活和良好动作.

en: Set bar in rack at knee or just below.
Brace core, grip bar overhand.
Drive hips forward to lock out top.
zh-Hans: 杠在架上, 膝盖或稍下高度.
核心收紧, 正握杠.
髋前送至顶部锁定.

en: Can use heavy load — don't ego-lift.
Maintain flat back at all times.
zh-Hans: 可大重量 — 不要装大.
全程保持平背.

en: Stand on one leg, dumbbell in opposite hand.
Hinge forward, back leg extends back.
Return to standing, control balance.
zh-Hans: 单腿站, 对侧手持哑铃.
前屈, 后腿向后伸.
回站直, 控制平衡.

en: Balance challenges form — use lighter weights.
zh-Hans: 平衡挑战大 — 用轻重量.

en: Very wide grip, bar on floor.
Drop hips low, chest up.
Pull bar to hip, full lockout.
zh-Hans: 极宽握, 杠在地面.
髋部下沉, 挺胸.
拉杠至髋, 完全锁定.

en: Wide grip + heavier ROM — common spine flexion error.
zh-Hans: 宽握加大幅度 — 常见脊柱屈错误.

en: Dumbbells at side, feet shoulder-width.
Hinge hips back, lower dumbbells to floor.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在体侧, 双脚与肩同宽.
髋后推, 哑铃下放至地面.
髋前送, 站立.

en: Keep flat back — hinge from hips.
zh-Hans: 保持平背 — 髋部铰链.

en: Stand with dumbbells in front of thighs.
Hinge hips back, lower dumbbells along legs.
Drive hips forward to stand back up.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃在大腿前.
髋后推, 哑铃沿腿下放.
髋前送, 起身.

en: Kettlebell between feet, hinge to grip handle.
Stand up, driving through heels.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 壶铃在双脚间, 前屈握把.
脚跟发力, 站立.
控制下放.

en: Stand on one leg, hinge forward.
Back leg extends, arms hang free.
Return to standing, control balance.
zh-Hans: 单腿站, 前屈.
后腿伸展, 双臂自然下垂.
回到站立, 控制平衡.

en: Smith bar at low position, feet under bar.
Hinge down, grip bar, brace core.
Drive through heels, stand tall.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杠低位, 双脚在杠下.
下蹲握杠, 核心收紧.
脚跟发力, 站直.

en: Position hips on pad, ankles under rollers.
Hinge forward, then rise to neutral spine.
Squeeze glutes/back, don't hyperextend.
zh-Hans: 髋部贴垫, 脚踝挂滚.
前屈再起到脊柱中立位.
收紧臀部/背部, 不要过伸.

en: Don't hyperextend at top — stop at neutral.
zh-Hans: 顶部不要过伸 — 停在中立位.

en: Hold plate/dumbbell at chest on hyperextension bench.
Hinge forward, rise to neutral.
Control descent throughout.
zh-Hans: 胸前抱杠片/哑铃, 上器械.
前屈, 起身至中立.
全程控制下放.

en: Avoid overextension at top — risk lower back strain.
zh-Hans: 顶部避免过伸 — 防止下背拉伤.

en: Lie face-down on bench, legs hanging off.
Lift legs to parallel with squeeze.
Lower under control, no swing.
zh-Hans: 俯卧凳上, 双腿悬空.
抬腿至平行, 收紧.
控制下放, 不摆动.

en: 45° bench, hips on pad, ankles secured.
Hinge forward, then extend to neutral.
Squeeze at top, lower with control.
zh-Hans: 45度凳, 髋贴垫, 脚踝固定.
前屈, 然后伸展至中立.
顶部收紧, 控制下放.

en: Lie face-down, arms extended overhead.
Lift arms and legs together off floor.
Hold briefly, lower with control.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 手臂前伸.
同时抬起手臂和双腿.
短暂保持, 控制下放.

en: Lie on bench, hold dumbbell over chest.
Lower dumbbell back over head with slight elbow bend.
Pull back over chest, lats engaged.
zh-Hans: 卧凳, 哑铃在胸上方.
肘微屈, 下放哑铃过头.
拉回胸上方, 背阔肌发力.

en: Don't go too low — protects shoulder.
zh-Hans: 不要下放过低 — 保护肩部.

en: Lie on bench under cable, grip straight bar.
Pull bar from over head to thighs.
Slow return, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 仰卧绳索机下, 握直杠.
拉杠从头顶到大腿.
缓慢回, 充分拉伸.

en: Sit on machine, grip handles overhead.
Pull arms down in arc to thighs.
Slowly return overhead with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 头上握手柄.
手臂弧线下拉至大腿.
控制缓慢回头顶.

en: Lie on bench, EZ-bar narrow grip over chest.
Lower bar back over head, slight elbow bend.
Pull back over chest.
zh-Hans: 卧凳, EZ杆窄握在胸上方.
杠下放过头, 肘微屈.
拉回胸上方.

en: Lie on bench, barbell over chest.
Lower bar overhead, slight elbow bend.
Pull back over chest with control.
zh-Hans: 卧凳, 杠铃在胸上方.
杠下放过头, 肘微屈.
控制拉回胸上方.

en: Lie down, band anchored behind head.
Pull band over chest in arc motion.
Slowly return overhead.
zh-Hans: 平躺, 弹力带固定头后.
弧线拉带过胸.
缓慢回头顶.

en: Kneel facing cable column, rope or bar overhead.
Arms straight, pull down to floor.
Return slowly overhead.
zh-Hans: 跪面绳索机, 绳或杠在头上.
手臂伸直, 下拉至地面.
缓慢回头顶.

en: Bar on upper back, feet shoulder-width.
Hinge hips back, torso parallel-ish to floor.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 杠放上背, 双脚与肩同宽.
髋后推, 躯干接近水平.
髋前送, 站立.

en: Use light weight — heavy GMs risk back injury.
Maintain neutral spine throughout.
zh-Hans: 用轻重量 — 大重量风险大.
全程保持脊柱中立.

en: Hold dumbbell on upper chest, feet shoulder-width.
Hinge hips back, lean forward.
Drive hips forward to stand.
zh-Hans: 上胸抱哑铃, 双脚与肩同宽.
髋后推, 前倾.
髋前送, 站立.

en: Hang from bar, arms straight.
Depress scapula — pull shoulders down without bending arms.
Slow return to full hang.
zh-Hans: 悬挂杠上, 手臂伸直.
肩胛下压 — 不弯臂下沉肩.
缓慢回到完全悬垂.

en: Hang from bar, arms straight, body relaxed.
Engage shoulders slightly to protect joint.
Hold for time.
zh-Hans: 悬挂杠上, 手臂伸直, 身体放松.
肩部略发力保护关节.
保持时间.

en: Lie chest-down on incline bench, dumbbell in hand.
Raise arm at 120° angle overhead.
Lower under control, isolate lower traps.
zh-Hans: 俯卧上斜凳, 持哑铃.
手臂120度抬至头上.
控制下放, 分离下斜方.

en: Sit at reverse pec deck, grip handles.
Pull handles back in arc to sides.
Squeeze upper back, return slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐于反向蝴蝶机, 握手柄.
向后弧线拉至体侧.
收紧上背, 缓慢回.

en: Hang passively from bar, body relaxed.
Feel stretch through lats.
Hold 30-60 seconds.
zh-Hans: 被动悬挂杠上, 身体放松.
感受背阔肌拉伸.

en: Sit on chest-supported row, grip handles.
Pull handles to ribcage, squeeze back.
Extend slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于胸支撑划船机, 握手柄.
拉手柄至肋部, 收紧背部.
控制缓慢伸展.

en: Lie chest down on Swiss ball, feet braced.
Hinge over ball, then extend to neutral.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 俯卧瑞士球, 双脚支撑.
前屈过球, 然后伸至中立.
控制下放.

en: Hands and knees, neutral spine.
Extend opposite arm and leg, hold briefly.
Return, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 四足跪姿, 脊柱中立.
伸展对侧手脚, 短暂保持.
回, 交替换侧.

en: Start with bar at thighs, slight bend.
Explosively shrug + pull bar to chest height.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠在大腿, 微屈.
爆发耸肩+上拉至胸高.
控制下放.

en: Use explosive technique — don't try heavy slow reps.
zh-Hans: 爆发动作 — 不要慢速大重量.

en: Lie crosswise on bench, only shoulders supported.
Hold dumbbell with both hands over chest.
Lower behind head, pull back over chest.
zh-Hans: 横躺凳上, 仅肩部支撑.
双手握哑铃在胸上方.
下放过头, 拉回胸上方.

en: Hips lower than head for max stretch.
zh-Hans: 髋低于头, 最大拉伸.

en: Stand perpendicular to landmine bar.
Pronated grip on bar end, hinge forward.
Row bar to hip, controlled descent.
zh-Hans: 垂直站于地雷杆.
正握杠端, 前屈.
拉杠至髋, 控制下放.

en: Bar at hip height, wide overhand grip.
Pull chest to bar, elbows wide.
Lower under control, body straight.
zh-Hans: 杠在髋高, 宽正握.
拉胸至杠, 肘部外展.
控制下放, 身体直线.

en: Stand with KB on floor in front, hinge to grip.
Hike KB between legs, drive hips forward.
Swing to chest height, hinge back down.
zh-Hans: 壶铃在前地面, 前屈握把.
壶铃过双腿, 髋部前送.
摆至胸高, 髋后推回.

en: Drive with hips, not arms — common error.
Keep neutral spine throughout swing.
zh-Hans: 髋部发力, 不是手臂 — 常见错误.
全程保持脊柱中立.

en: Stand, barbell at thighs, underhand grip.
Curl bar up to shoulders, elbows pinned.
Lower slowly with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 杠铃在大腿, 反握.
弯举至肩, 肘部固定.
缓慢控制下放.

en: Don't swing torso — strict elbow movement.
zh-Hans: 不要摆躯干 — 严格肘关节运动.

en: Stand, dumbbells at sides, palms forward.
Curl up, supinate at top.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃在体侧, 掌心向前.
弯举上举, 顶部外旋.
控制下放.

en: Stand, EZ-bar at thighs, narrow grip.
Curl to shoulders, elbows still.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, EZ杆在大腿, 窄握.
弯举至肩, 肘部不动.
控制下放.

en: Stand facing cable, low pulley, straight bar.
Curl up — keep elbows pinned at sides.
Squeeze at top, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 低位定滑轮, 直杆.
上举弯举 — 肘部固定在体侧.
顶部收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Sit at machine, arms on pad, grip handles.
Curl handles up to shoulders.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 手臂贴垫, 握手柄.
弯举手柄至肩.
控制下放.

en: Stand, dumbbells at sides, neutral grip.
Curl up, palms stay facing each other.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃在体侧, 中立握.
弯举, 掌心保持相对.
控制下放.

en: Low pulley, rope attachment, neutral grip.
Curl rope up, hammer position.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 绳索把, 中立握.
弯举绳, 锤式位.
控制下放.

en: Sit at preacher bench, arms on pad.
Curl EZ-bar up, full range.
Lower slowly to full extension.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳, 手臂贴垫.
弯举EZ杆, 全程.
缓慢下放至完全伸展.

en: Don't fully lock out — protect biceps tendon.
zh-Hans: 不要完全锁死 — 保护二头肌腱.

en: Sit at preacher bench, single dumbbell.
Curl up with full bicep contraction.
Lower slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳, 单哑铃.
弯举, 二头充分收缩.
缓慢控制下放.

en: Sit at preacher bench facing low cable.
Curl bar up with constant tension.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳面对低位绳索.
弯举杠, 全程张力.
控制下放.

en: Sit at machine, arms on pad, grip handles.
Curl with controlled motion.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于器械, 手臂贴垫, 握把.
控制弯举.
控制下放.

en: Sit on 45-60° incline bench, arms hanging.
Curl dumbbells up, supinate at top.
Lower fully, max biceps stretch.
zh-Hans: 45-60度上斜凳, 双臂自然下垂.
弯举哑铃, 顶部外旋.
完全下放, 二头最大拉伸.

en: Sit on bench, elbow on inner thigh, dumbbell.
Curl up slowly, peak squeeze at top.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 肘抵大腿内侧, 哑铃.
缓慢弯举, 顶部峰收紧.
控制下放.

en: Chest on incline bench, arms hang vertical.
Curl dumbbells up, focus on peak.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 胸贴上斜凳, 双臂垂直下垂.
弯举哑铃, 重点峰值.
控制下放.

en: Stand, barbell with overhand grip.
Curl up to shoulders, palms down.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 杠铃正握.
弯举至肩, 掌心向下.
控制下放.

en: Stand, dumbbells in front, overhand grip.
Curl up, palms down throughout.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃在前, 正握.
弯举上举, 掌心始终向下.
控制下放.

en: Stand, EZ-bar, overhand grip.
Curl up, palms stay down.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立, EZ杆, 正握.
弯举, 掌心保持向下.
控制下放.

en: Low pulley, straight bar, overhand grip.
Curl up to chest, palms down.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 直杆, 正握.
弯举至胸, 掌心向下.
控制下放.

en: Stand, barbell at thighs, underhand grip.
Drag bar up body, elbows behind torso.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 杠铃在大腿, 反握.
杠沿身上拖, 肘部在躯干后.
控制下放.

en: Curl dumbbells up with underhand grip.
At top, rotate to overhand grip.
Lower with overhand grip, repeat.
zh-Hans: 反握弯举哑铃上来.
顶部翻转为正握.
正握下放, 重复.

en: Stand, dumbbells neutral grip at sides.
Curl dumbbell across body to opposite shoulder.
Lower, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃中立握于体侧.
弯举哑铃跨身至对侧肩.
下放, 交替换侧.

en: 7 half curls bottom to middle.
7 half curls middle to top.
7 full range curls.
zh-Hans: 7次半程 (底到中).
7次半程 (中到顶).
7次全程弯举.

en: Significant biceps fatigue — use lighter weight.
zh-Hans: 二头疲劳大 — 用轻重量.

en: Sit at vertical-side preacher bench.
Curl EZ-bar full range with strict form.
Lower to full extension.
zh-Hans: 坐于直立面牧师凳.
全程严格弯举EZ杆.
下放至完全伸展.

en: Stand between two high pulleys, single handles.
Arms extended, curl handles to ears.
Squeeze peak, slowly extend.
zh-Hans: 站于双高位滑轮间, 单手把.
手臂伸展, 弯举把至耳侧.
峰值收紧, 缓慢伸展.

en: Stand, single dumbbell, focus on one arm.
Curl up with strict form, squeeze top.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 单哑铃, 专注一臂.
严格弯举, 顶部收紧.
控制下放.

en: Stand, dumbbells at sides, palms forward.
Curl one arm up, lower, alternate.
Supinate at top.
zh-Hans: 站立, 哑铃在体侧, 掌心向前.
单臂弯举, 下放, 交替.
顶部外旋.

en: Sit on bench, dumbbells at sides.
Curl both up to shoulders.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 哑铃在体侧.
双臂弯举至肩.
控制下放.

en: Sit on incline bench, dumbbells hanging neutral.
Hammer curl up to shoulders.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐上斜凳, 哑铃中立下垂.
锤式弯举至肩.
控制下放.

en: Low pulley, rope attachment, neutral grip.
Curl up, twist palms out at top.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 绳索把, 中立握.
弯举, 顶部掌心外翻.
控制下放.

en: Barbell, narrow grip, palms up.
Curl to shoulders, targets outer biceps.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃, 窄握, 掌心向上.
弯举至肩, 强调二头外侧.
控制下放.

en: Narrow grip can stress wrists — use EZ-bar if uncomfortable.
zh-Hans: 窄握给手腕压力 — 不适用EZ杆.

en: Barbell, grip wider than shoulders.
Curl up, targets inner biceps (short head).
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃, 宽于肩握距.
弯举, 强调二头内侧 (短头).
控制下放.

en: Low pulley behind you, single handle.
Arm extended back, curl forward to shoulder.
Slow return, max biceps stretch.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮在身后, 单手把.
手臂后伸, 向前弯举至肩.
缓慢回, 二头最大拉伸.

en: Stand on band, grip handles or ends.
Curl up to shoulders.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 踩弹力带, 握把或带端.
弯举至肩.
控制下放.

en: Underhand grip on bar, focus on biceps.
Pull chin over bar with bicep emphasis.
Lower slowly to full hang.
zh-Hans: 反握杠, 重点二头.
下巴拉过杠, 二头发力.
缓慢下放至完全悬垂.

en: Lie on back facing low pulley, grip straight bar.
Curl bar up to forehead with constant tension.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 仰卧面对低位滑轮, 握直杠.
弯举杠至额头, 全程张力.
缓慢下放.

en: Sit at curl machine, arms on pad.
Curl handles, full contraction at top.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于弯举机, 手臂贴垫.
弯举把, 顶部完全收紧.
控制下放.

en: Sit beside low cable, brace elbow on knee.
Curl handle to shoulder.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于低位绳索旁, 肘抵膝.
弯举把至肩.
控制下放.

en: Stand, kettlebells in each hand, curl underhand.
Curl up to shoulders.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双手各持壶铃, 反握.
弯举至肩.
控制下放.

en: Hold dumbbell vertically by one head with both hands.
Curl up to chin level.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 双手捧哑铃顶端 (像端盘).
弯举至下巴.
控制下放.

en: Start with neutral grip, dumbbells at sides.
As you curl, rotate palms to face you.
Lower while rotating back to neutral.
zh-Hans: 中立握起始, 哑铃在体侧.
弯举时翻转掌心向自己.
下放时翻回中立.

en: Curl dumbbell to 90° angle.
Hold position with biceps engaged.
Maintain for time.
zh-Hans: 弯举哑铃至90度.
二头收紧保持位置.
持续时间.

en: Grip dumbbell with thumb touching one weight side.
Curl up with supination — offset increases stress.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 握哑铃, 拇指贴一侧重物.
弯举外旋 — 偏置增加压力.
控制下放.

en: Sit at preacher bench, neutral grip.
Curl dumbbells up hammer-style.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳, 中立握.
锤式弯举哑铃.
控制下放.

en: Sit on incline bench, palms supinated outward.
Curl dumbbells, focus on inner head squeeze.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐上斜凳, 掌心向外旋.
弯举哑铃, 内侧短头收紧.
控制下放.

en: Stand, EZ-bar narrow grip at thighs.
Drag bar up body, elbows behind torso.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, EZ杆窄握于大腿.
杠沿身上拖, 肘部在躯干后.
控制下放.

en: Start with neutral grip, dumbbells at sides.
Curl up while rotating palms upward.
Lower with rotation back to neutral.
zh-Hans: 中立握起始, 哑铃在体侧.
弯举时掌心翻转向上.
下放时翻回中立.

en: 7 half curls bottom to middle.
7 half curls middle to top.
7 full curls — burning finish.
zh-Hans: 7次半程 (底到中).
7次半程 (中到顶).
7次全程 — 烧灼收尾.

en: Use lighter weight than usual — high fatigue.
zh-Hans: 用比平时轻的重量 — 疲劳度高.

en: Chest on incline bench facing cable.
Curl bar with constant tension.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 胸贴上斜凳面对绳索.
弯举杠, 全程张力.
控制下放.

en: Use both hands to lift dumbbell to top.
Lower with one arm — 5+ second descent.
Repeat for prescribed reps.
zh-Hans: 双手帮助上举至顶.
单臂下放 — 5秒以上.
重复设定次数.

en: High DOMS — gradual progression.
zh-Hans: 延迟酸痛大 — 渐进.

en: Sit, forearms on thighs, palms up, wrists hang.
Curl wrists up, contract forearms.
Lower with control, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 掌心向上, 手腕悬空.
腕屈, 收紧前臂.
控制下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Sit on bench, forearms on thighs, underhand grip on bar.
Curl wrists up, full contraction.
Lower with full extension.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 前臂贴大腿, 反握杠铃.
腕屈, 完全收紧.
下放至完全伸展.

en: Kneel facing low pulley, grip bar underhand.
Forearms on bench, curl wrists up.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 跪面低位滑轮, 反握杠.
前臂贴凳, 腕屈.
控制下放.

en: Sit, forearms on thighs, palms down.
Curl wrists up (extension), squeeze top.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 掌心向下.
腕伸, 顶部收紧.
控制下放.

en: Sit, forearms on thighs, overhand grip on bar.
Extend wrists up, hold briefly.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 正握杠.
腕伸, 短暂保持.
控制下放.

en: Stand, hold bar behind back, palms back.
Curl wrists up by flexing forearm.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 背后握杠, 掌心向后.
前臂屈, 腕弯举.
控制下放.

en: Grip heavy dumbbells, stand tall.
Walk with shoulders back, controlled steps.
Maintain grip and posture for distance.
zh-Hans: 握大重量哑铃, 直立.
肩膀后展行走, 步伐稳定.
保持握力和姿态走一段距离.

en: Don't shrug shoulders — relaxed posture.
zh-Hans: 不要耸肩 — 自然放松.

en: Grip heavy kettlebells, stand tall.
Walk with controlled steps, posture upright.
Maintain grip throughout distance.
zh-Hans: 握大重量壶铃, 直立.
稳步行走, 姿态挺立.
全程保持握力.

en: Stand inside trap bar, deadlift to standing.
Walk with controlled steps.
Set down with hinge form.
zh-Hans: 站于六角杠内, 硬拉至站立.
稳步行走.
用铰链动作放下.

en: Grip single heavy dumbbell on one side.
Walk while bracing core to resist lean.
Switch sides midway.
zh-Hans: 单手握大重量哑铃.
行走时核心抗侧倾.
中途换边.

en: Pinch two plates together, smooth sides out.
Hold by thumb + fingers, stand or walk.
Hold for time.
zh-Hans: 夹两片杠片, 光滑面朝外.
拇指+四指夹, 站或走.
保持时间.

en: Drape towel over pull-up bar.
Hang from towel ends with bent elbows.
Hold for time.
zh-Hans: 毛巾搭在引体杠上.
握毛巾两端悬挂, 肘部微屈.
保持时间.

en: Hang from bar with single hand.
Engage shoulder, body relaxed.
Hold for time, switch arms.
zh-Hans: 单手悬挂杠.
肩部发力, 身体放松.
保持时间, 换臂.

en: Hold roller out at arm's length.
Roll weight up by alternating wrist flexion.
Roll back down with control.
zh-Hans: 前伸持卷绳器.
交替屈腕卷起重量.
控制卷下.

en: Hold grip crusher in one hand.
Close fully, squeeze hard.
Open slowly, repeat.
zh-Hans: 单手握握力器.
完全合拢, 用力捏.
缓慢张开, 重复.

en: Plunge hands into rice bucket.
Open/close fingers, twist wrists.
Train for time, multiple directions.
zh-Hans: 双手插入米桶.
开合手指, 旋转手腕.
持续时间, 多方向训练.

en: Sit, forearms on thighs, underhand grip.
Open fingers slightly, roll bar to fingertips.
Curl back into palm, squeeze.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 反握.
微张手指, 杠滚至指尖.
卷回手心, 握紧.

en: Hold dumbbell vertically by one end.
Tilt wrist toward thumb side (radial).
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 竖向单端握哑铃.
腕部向拇指侧倾 (桡侧).
控制下放.

en: Hold dumbbell vertically by one end.
Tilt wrist toward pinky side (ulnar).
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 竖向单端握哑铃.
腕部向小指侧倾 (尺侧).
控制下放.

en: Hold dumbbell by one end (offset weight).
Rotate wrist palm-up to palm-down.
Control through full rotation.
zh-Hans: 单端握哑铃 (重量偏置).
腕部从掌心向上转向下.
全程旋转控制.

en: Attach fat grips to dumbbell handles.
Curl up to shoulders with fat grip.
Lower with control — grip emphasis.
zh-Hans: 粗握套加哑铃手柄.
粗握弯举至肩.
控制下放 — 强调握力.

en: Sit, single forearm on thigh, palm up.
Curl wrist up, full forearm contraction.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 单前臂贴大腿, 掌心向上.
腕屈, 前臂完全收紧.
控制下放.

en: Low pulley, grip bar overhand.
Forearms on bench, extend wrists upward.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 正握杠.
前臂贴凳, 腕部上伸.
控制下放.

en: Heavy spring gripper, single hand.
Close fully with deliberate effort.
Negative open, repeat.
zh-Hans: 重型弹簧握力器, 单手.
用力完全合拢.
缓慢释放, 重复.

en: Strain risk — progress slowly with heavy grippers.
zh-Hans: 拉伤风险 — 大握力器渐进.

en: Hold sledgehammer end vertical at arm's length.
Tilt hammer back, then forward with wrist only.
Control through full ROM.
zh-Hans: 前伸竖握大锤.
腕部前后倾, 仅腕部用力.
全程控制.

en: Set bar at hip height in rack, heavy load.
Grip bar, lift off pins.
Hold for time, set back down.
zh-Hans: 杠铃架于髋高, 大重量.
握杠, 卸下.
保持时间, 放回.

en: Axle bar (thick-bar) at thighs, underhand grip.
Curl up to shoulders.
Lower with control — grip is key.
zh-Hans: 轴杠 (粗杠) 于大腿, 反握.
弯举至肩.
控制下放 — 握力关键.

en: Sit at preacher bench, EZ-bar overhand grip.
Curl up with palms down.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐于牧师凳, EZ杆正握.
掌心向下弯举.
控制下放.

en: Low pulley, rope attachment, neutral grip.
Hammer curl rope to chest level.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 低位滑轮, 绳索把, 中立握.
锤式弯举至胸高.
控制下放.

en: Curl barbell to 90° elbow angle.
Hold with biceps fully engaged.
Maintain for time.
zh-Hans: 杠铃弯举至肘90度.
二头完全收紧保持.
持续时间.

en: Stand sideways to low pulley, cable behind body.
Grip single handle, curl forward.
Maintains tension at peak.
zh-Hans: 侧站低位滑轮, 绳索在身后.
握单手把, 前弯举.
峰值张力.

en: Sit, forearm on thigh, kettlebell in hand.
Flex wrist up against KB weight.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 前臂贴大腿, 持壶铃.
腕屈对抗壶铃重量.
控制下放.

en: Set bench to 45° incline, sit back.
Dumbbells hang straight down, curl up.
Lower fully — biceps long-head emphasis.
zh-Hans: 凳调至45度上斜, 后靠.
哑铃下垂, 弯举.
完全下放 — 强调二头长头.

en: Stand, arms up at 90°, flex both biceps.
Hold peak contraction for time.
Focus on mind-muscle connection.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双臂90度上举, 收紧双二头.
峰值收缩保持.
专注心肌连接.

en: Step on band, grip ends, palms up.
Forearms on thighs, curl wrists up.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 踩弹力带, 握两端, 掌心向上.
前臂贴大腿, 腕屈.
控制下放.
